title: Light Festive Russian Fennel Stew
description: A tangy, light, festive Russian-inspired dish featuring fennel seeds, suitable for low-glycemic diets. Perfect for a weeknight dinner or special occasion.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add sliced carrots and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly tender.
Add sliced fennel and cook for 3-4 minutes, until slightly tender.
Add fennel seeds, chicken broth, and lemon juice. Bring to a simmer.
Season with salt, black pepper, and additional fennel seeds if desired.
Transfer the stew to the preheated oven and braise for 20-25 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Garnish with fresh parsley and a dollop of Greek yogurt, if desired.
Serve hot, with additional yogurt and fennel seeds on the side, if desired.
